# Backend Agent

_Last updated: 2026-04-13_

## Status

No backend service is active in the current local architecture.

## Planned Stack (Phase 4 - do not implement without explicit instruction)

- Node.js runtime
- Lightweight API layer for persistence/replay
- Managed datastore for snapshots/metrics

## Rules

- Do not scaffold a backend unless explicitly instructed.
- Use local mock data and in-memory structures until backend work is approved.
- Do not introduce real API keys or credentials into the codebase.
